data.title: Kraken Robotics appoints Terra Penrose as Chief People Officer, based in Nova Scotia - Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: Kraken Robotics Inc. has recently appointed Terra Penrose as its Chief People Officer at the Nova Scotia office. This announcement was made on January 12, 2026. The company is listed as (“Kraken” or the “Company”) on the TSX-V (Stock Symbol: PNG) and OTCQB (Stock Symbol: KRKNF) stock exchanges.

data.title: Nuvalent progressing with OnTarget 2026 plan for zidesamtinib, with FDA NDA accepted; PDUFA target action date set for Sept 18, 2026 and neladalkib NDA submission planned for first half 2026.
data.description: The FDA has approved the New Drug Application (NDA) for zidesamtinib to treat advanced ROS1-positive NSCLC patients who have previously undergone TKI treatment. The Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) target action date for this drug is September 18, 2026. Furthermore, an NDA submission for neladalkib, intended for the TKI pre-treated advanced ALK-positive NSCLC population, is scheduled for the first half of 2026.

data.title: In 2026, QuickBooks Payroll awarded for automated tax compliance, reducing risk for employers - Expert Consumers.
data.description: In a report released on January 12, 2026, Expert Consumers acknowledged QuickBooks Payroll for its payroll software that includes tax filing services. The recognition highlighted the software's automated payroll tax compliance features and its capacity to minimize administrative risks for employers. This acknowledgment showcases QuickBooks Payroll's commitment to efficient and compliant payroll processes.
DOT Strips California Of $160 Million Over Foreign Truckers

data.title: Groupe Dynamite reports strong holiday sales with 30.8% growth in first 9 wks of Q4 fiscal 2025. Online revenue outpaced in-store sales. Plans to launch UK e-commerce and stores in Q1 2026. Year-end store count expected at 307, with 20 new openings. Adjusted EBITDA margin raised to 36.0% - 37.0%.CAPEX guidance now $80.0 - $90.0 million.
data.description: Groupe Dynamite Inc. reported a 30.8% growth in comparable store sales in the first 9 weeks of Q4 fiscal 2025 with year-to-date growth standing at 26.6%. They updated their full-year guidance for comparable store sales growth to 26.5% to 27.0% and adjusted EBITDA margin to 36.0% to 37.0%. Online revenue growth surpassed brick-and-mortar revenue growth in Q4. The company plans to launch a UK e-commerce platform and UK brick-and-mortar stores later in Q1 2026. They expect 307 total stores by year-end, with 20 openings and 9 net new stores. The revised capital expenditure guidance is $80.0 to $90.0 million. The full financial results are expected to be released on April 1, 2026.

data.title: WEX (NYSE: WEX) announced a multi-year plan to refresh its Board of Directors, aiming for enhanced oversight and leadership.
data.description: In Portland, Maine, WEX (NYSE: WEX), a global commerce platform facilitating business operations, disclosed alterations to its Board of Directors. These modifications aim to bolster the Board's oversight efficiency. Over the past years, the Board has strategized and implemented a plan to facilitate a deliberate shift in independent director leadership, aiding in the transition.

data.title: Babcock & Wilcox to join 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference on Jan 16, 2026; event to be virtual.
data.description: Akron, Ohio-based company B&W will be attending the 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference on Friday, January 16, 2026. The conference will be held virtually.

data.title: Aura reports record high production in Q4 2025 & 2025, achieving guidance targets.	stats & specifics undisclosed.
data.description: Aura has reported its preliminary production results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and the full year, showcasing record-breaking production levels. In Q4 2025, the company achieved a significant increase in production compared to previous quarters. The production numbers for the full year of 2025 also exceeded expectations, with the company successfully meeting its production guidance for the year. The positive results indicate a successful year for Aura in terms of production output for both Q4 2025 and the overall 2025 fiscal year.

data.title: Home Depot partners with Google Cloud for agentic AI tools, enhancing customer experience with real-time guidance.
data.description: Home Depot, Inc. revealed an expansion of its strategic partnership with Alphabet Inc.'s Google Cloud, introducing agentic AI tools to offer real-time guidance to homeowners and professional customers. By utilizing Google Cloud's Gemini models and Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience, the retailer aims to provide a seamless, personalized "AI-first" experience. Moving forward, Home Depot will extend these AI capabilities to new shopping experiences through Google Search's AI Mode and the Gemini app. This collaboration brings advanced technology to enhance customer interactions and streamline services.

data.title: Detroit students will showcase school choice options on Jan. 26 at Majestic Theatre, highlighting K-12 schools.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Detroit, hundreds of students will convene at the Majestic Theatre to express their appreciation for their schools. The event aims to highlight various K-12 school choice options available in Michigan. The gathering will demonstrate the students' dedication to their education and the diverse educational opportunities present in the state.

data.title: USANA Health Sciences announces preliminary FY 2025 sales numbers and FY 2026 outlook. CFO and COO to discuss strategy at conference. (Characters: 129)
data.description: Salt Lake City – USANA Health Sciences, Inc. revealed initial financial insights for the year 2025, including net sales figures and projections for the upcoming fiscal year 2026. The company, listed on the NYSE under USNA, shared this information before their participation in the 28th Annual ICR Conference. During the event, USANA’s CFO, Doug Hekking, and COO, Walter Noot, will provide detailed insights on the company’s strategies, encompassing the preliminary sales guidance for the fiscal year 2026. For the fiscal year 2025, USANA expects a positive trajectory in net sales, setting the stage for a prospective strong performance in the upcoming year.

data.title: Comstock Metals launches end-of-life solar facility in California, serving the largest US market, with a strategic location in Central Valley.
data.description: In Virginia City, Nevada, on January 12, 2026, Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) and Comstock Metals LLC revealed their latest move in the recycling domain. Comstock Metals, recognized for its eco-friendly disposal of end-of-life solar panels, has attained a facility in California specifically to cater to its California clientele, the largest market in the U.S. Positioned in the Central Valley, this facility serves as a key point for collecting, preparing, and consolidating decommissioned photovoltaic (PV) panels in the region. These panels will eventually undergo closed-loop recycling in Comstock's authorized facility in Nevada.

data.title: Students from across Alaska to showcase educational models at King's Alaska on Jan. 26, highlighting K-12 school choice options.
data.description: In Wasilla, Alaska, on Jan. 12, 2026, students from diverse educational backgrounds in Alaska will convene at King's Alaska on Monday, Jan. 26 to express their admiration for their learning experiences. The gathering will highlight the various K-12 school options available in the region.
